reviews.review_description: Sphere has a wide range of innovative features which combined take spatial collaboration, whether remote or co-located, to the next level. It is awesome that users on many different device types can collaborate seamlessly through Sphere
Loving all of the many possible hologram interactions you can do!

Sphere is a top-notch solution for enterprises with mixed reality use cases. Users who are geographically apart can feel like they are in the same space using lifelike avatars. Perfect for remote assistance, layout planning, design review, and digital work instructions.
